CustomField.formula: dxHighLevelPolicyGoal_point__c + dxPolicyPriority_point__c + currentBimCapabilityDesignProdType_point__c + currentBimCapabilityConstruction_point__c + currentBimCapabilityDesignDept_point__c + currentBimCapabilityConstructionDept_poi__c + bimUsePhaseTemporary_point__c + bimUsePhaseFoundation_point__c + bimUsePhaseStructure_point__c + bimUsePhaseEquipment_point__c + bimUsePhaseInterior_point__c + bimUsePhaseExterior_point__c + bimUsePhaseExteriorWork_point__c + bimUsePhaseCompletion_point__c + bimUsePatternClashCheck_point__c + bimUsePatternConstructionSim_point__c + bimUsePatternConsensus_point__c + bimUsePatternShopDrawing_point__c + bimUsePatternQuantityData_point__c + currentBimCreationConditions_point__c + interiorBimModelCountRatio_point__c + bimPromotionIssuesCustomer_point__c + bimUtilizationLevelPlan_point__c + gcBaSimilarModelInitiatives_point__c
CustomField.label: 顧客側のDX/BIM関連情報_小計
